title: Qualifications gained at UK Higher Education Institutions: NI analysis 2023/24
body: "This statistical bulletin has been produced by the Department for the Economy (DfE), Northern Ireland (NI) and provides information on Higher Education (HE) qualifications gained by students at NI Higher Education Institutions (HEIs), and by NI domiciled students at UK HEIs, in the academic year 2023/24. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education courses and qualifications
